Le Phung Ha

Software Engineering student at Duy Tan University. Specializing in C# & ASP.NET Core, building resilient backends, database architectures, and integrating Artificial Intelligence (AI/NLP) solutions.

About Me

My Journey & Ambitions

Outside the Code

When I'm not coding, I collect Mecha action figures, set up freshwater aquariums, or jump into tactical Valorant matches with my team!

Architecting Optimal and Reliable Systems

I am currently pursuing a Bachelor's in Software Engineering (2023 - 2027) at Duy Tan University. Aspiring to build a career as a professional C# / Backend Developer, I actively research web architecture, efficient DevOps pipelines, and smart applications incorporating Natural Language Processing (NLP).

2023 - 2027

Duy Tan University (DTU)

Research Spotlight

AI & Health Social Network

🥉 3rd Prize - Student Research Symposium on IT 2026
Independent Research & Development

MindConnect – Depression Detection Social Network

A pioneering social network applying Vietnamese NLP models and LLMs to detect early depression signs from user behavior and content, integrated with an AI mental health companion.

Vietnamese NLP Classifier

Trained localized Python text-classification models to recognize markers of depression.

Cross-Platform Backend

Configured unified ASP.NET Core APIs to serve Razor web views and React Native clients simultaneously.

Hybrid LLM Support

Integrated GPT and Gemini engines for chatbot support, mental health advice, and real-time guidance.

ASP.NET Core React Native Python (NLP) SQL Server OpenAI & Gemini
